legacyWebHandler.notes: Requires [Authorize]. Calls SetQuantities first to sync basket quantities, then CreateOrderAsync with a HARDCODED address new Address('123 Main St.', 'Kent', 'OH', 'United States', '44240'), then DeleteBasketAsync. Catches EmptyBasketOnCheckoutException and redirects to /Basket/Index. Redirects to /Basket/Checkout/Success on success.

calls.notes: Spec filters by Baskets.Id and eagerly loads Items. Returns null if not found.
Guard.Against.Null(basket) — throws ArgumentNullException if basket not found. REST target should return 404.
Guard.Against.EmptyBasketOnCheckout(basket.Items) — throws EmptyBasketOnCheckoutException if basket.Items is empty. REST target should return 422.
Fetches all CatalogItem rows for the basket's CatalogItemIds in a single batch query — used to snapshot Name and PictureUri into each OrderItem.

Value object — snapshots catalog item name and absolute picture URI at order time. Guard.Against.OutOfRange(catalogItemId >= 1), Guard.Against.NullOrEmpty(productName), Guard.Against.NullOrEmpty(pictureUri).

db.notes: All OrderItem rows inserted as part of the Order aggregate via EF Core cascade.
